title: Xtra Roasted Polish Cheese Casserole
description: A quick-fix Polish dish featuring roasted cheese and scotch bonnet peppers, perfect for a low-carb dinner option.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the cauliflower florets with melted butter, garlic powder, paprika, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the cauliflower mixture in a single layer on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes.
While the cauliflower is roasting, deglaze a large skillet with chicken broth over medium heat, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
Add the diced scotch bonnet peppers to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
In a large casserole dish, combine the roasted cauliflower, cooked scotch bonnet peppers, and shredded polish cheese.
Return the casserole dish to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
